helpful: Provisioned full petition text — the QP, split presentation, and AEDPA posture were all readable without any fetching.
Statpack relist/CVSG/originating-circuit cuts gave a clean anchor for a zero-relist, no-CVSG paid CA5 petition.
fedcourts query --disposition granted made the granted-pool contrast (elite counsel, amici, relists) easy to see.
gaps: The committed statpack.md has no 'Segment base rate by salience band' table (the prompt names it as the preferred anchor for a selected petition) — I had to approximate the selected-slice yardstick from the era table.
Snapshot shows no waiver-of-response entry even though the response due date passed and the case was distributed; a waiver/CFR status field would sharpen the near-term signal.
Per-fee-class (paid vs IFP) grant rates are said to ride in statpack.json but are not surfaced in statpack.md.
notes: Forward cell; one corpus query and one MCP docket-status check were sufficient on top of the provisioned inputs.
